title: Buildscape
description: The Builders first Best Friend - Adds 1500 New Blocks
body:
# Buildscape: The Ultimate get away to Builders Paradise!
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe8b6208071ccaa1cae8e4b6c63b778da981d16.png)
 ■ Adds Over 1500 Blocks Fully obtainable in Survival mode
 
   ◈ Adds Wood Type Ashpen, which the planks can be Colored

   ◈ Adds Christmas Decor Blocks, Star, String Lights, Glow Lights, Snowy Foliage, Icicles etc

   ◈ Adds Dyeable Planks, Item Frames, Redstone lamp, Sand, Petals

   ◈ Adds Glass types, Mosaic, Glazed, Factory Glass

   ◈ Adds Factory Blocks, Caution Blocks, Steel Blocks, etc

   ◈ Adds Cascade Block, Smoke Vents, Pillar (Pedestal)

   ◈ Backported alot of Blocks
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe8b6208071ccaa1cae8e4b6c63b778da981d16.png)
## Use Code **100K-BUILDSCAPE-CAKE** on  [Buildscape Webpage](https://www.buildscape.online/) by Logining In & Redeeming the Code
![100K](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e893f4806083191209a423fb261c4c823f01858a.png)
![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebe8b6208071ccaa1cae8e4b6c63b778da981d16.png)
